# ExcelAestheticsLoop

> An industrial-grade MCP server for Excel aesthetics engineering and visual auditing.

## Core Resources
- [README.md](README.md): Detailed project overview and architecture.
- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): Operational guide for AI agents.
- [LICENSE](LICENSE): MIT license details.

## Implementation Details
- [Core Bridge](core/com_bridge.py): The isolated COM subprocess bridge logic.
- [Vision Service](services/vision_service.py): Visual RIP and smart audit logic.
- [Layout Service](services/layout_service.py): Aesthetics padding and row height engine.

## API & Tools
- `smart_audit_read`: Full schema extraction with high-risk column rendering.
- `inject_aesthetics_padding`: Parameterized row-height optimization.
- `get_layout_metrics`: Quantitative spatial analysis of spreadsheets.
